name: clustr
description: Manage your Proxmox VE cluster (nodes, VMs, LXC containers) from Claude.
long_description: Clustr exposes your Proxmox VE infrastructure as MCP tools so you can inspect and manage nodes, VMs, and LXC containers directly from Claude. Runs locally over stdio — no network port is opened. It can only do what the Proxmox API token you provide is allowed to do; use a least-privilege token (PVEAuditor for read-only).

proxmox_host.title: Proxmox Host
proxmox_host.description: IP or hostname of your Proxmox node (e.g. 192.168.1.10)

proxmox_user.title: Proxmox User
proxmox_user.description: Proxmox user with the realm, e.g. root@pam

proxmox_token_name.title: API Token Name
proxmox_token_name.description: The API token ID you created in Proxmox (Datacenter → API Tokens)

proxmox_token_value.title: API Token Secret
proxmox_token_value.description: The token secret value. Stored securely in your OS keychain.

proxmox_verify_ssl.title: Verify TLS certificate
proxmox_verify_ssl.description: Leave off for Proxmox's default self-signed certificate.
